parameters.query: INSERT INTO email_incoming_logs (tenant_id, email_id, thread_id, from_address, to_address, subject, body_preview, has_attachments, provider, classification, action, source, matched_rule_id, reply_subject, reply_body, reply_html, reply_confidence, reply_action, tokens_used) VALUES ('{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid, {{ $json.emailId ? "'" + $json.emailId + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.threadId ? "'" + $json.threadId + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.fromAddress }}', '{{ $json.toAddress }}', '{{ $json.subject.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.bodyPreview.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.hasAttachments }}, '{{ $json.provider }}', '{{ $json.classification }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.action }}', '{{ $json.source }}', {{ $json.matchedRuleId ? "'" + $json.matchedRuleId + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.replySubject ? "'" + $json.replySubject.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.replyBody ? "'" + $json.replyBody.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.replyHtml ? "'" + $json.replyHtml.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.replyConfidence }}, '{{ $json.replyAction }}', {{ $json.tokensUsed }}) RETURNING id, created_at
